steps.title: Use the key phrase
steps.content: The text says Maja Solberg incorporates hip-hop rhythms into the hyperpop sound. That means her music varies the typical hyperpop model while still remaining within hyperpop.

steps.title: Avoid unsupported claims
steps.content: Choice A says some recordings reject the model outright. Choice C makes an unsupported claim about influence. Choice D invents an effect on established artists. The remaining choice captures divergence without abandonment. The answer is B.
